log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster.
→ Tiefling — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 35/67
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Tiefling — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:3+12=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 fire damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 20/67
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Tiefling — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:9+12=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 fire damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 9/67
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Tiefling — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:18+12=30 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 fire damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: -2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
